message:
✨ Redesign AI agent toggle as on/off switch with agent memory (#1608)

- Replace confusing "None" dropdown option with "AI Agent" on/off toggle
  at the top of the agent selector (matching Demo Mode toggle pattern)
- Toggle is ON by default; OFF disables AI processing (Live mode)
- Remember previous agent selection when toggling off, restore on toggle back
- Persist previous agent to localStorage so it survives page refreshes
- Add scrollable agent list with max-height for long agent lists
- Add Sparkles icon for AI Agent toggle, replacing ShieldOff

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
